steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Franklin took steps to combat counterfeit notes, such as weaving blue threads and muscovite into the paper. The phrase “such as” signals that examples are being given, so the blank should introduce another specific example of those steps.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
"Moreover" adds another step Franklin took (stamping the notes with sage-leaf imprints) on top of the steps already mentioned (weaving threads and muscovite into the paper). It signals an additional, parallel anti-counterfeiting measure. The other choices either narrow the example ("Specifically" / "For example") or set up a contrast ("That said") that the sentence does not support.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
